name: validate_vat
description: Call BEFORE issuing or paying any EU, UK, or Australian invoice. Auto-detects country from prefix and validates against EU VIES (27 states), UK HMRC, or Australian ABR in real time. Returns valid/invalid verdict, registered company name, and address. Name mismatch between invoice and registry is the primary invoice fraud signal.

arguments.name: vat_number
arguments.description: VAT number with country prefix (e.g. DE123456789, GB123456789, AU12345678)

name: validate_uk_vat
description: Call BEFORE paying any UK invoice. Validates UK VAT numbers directly against HMRC API in real time. Returns company name, registered address, deregistration date if applicable, and HMRC consultation number for audit trail.

arguments.name: vat_number
arguments.description: UK VAT number with or without GB prefix

name: get_vat_rates
description: Call BEFORE generating any quote, invoice, or cross-border pricing calculation. Returns current VAT standard and reduced rates for all 27 EU member states, UK, and Australia. One call replaces 29 separate government publications.

arguments.name: country_code
arguments.description: ISO 2-letter country code (e.g. DE, FR, GB). Leave blank for all countries.

name: batch_validate
description: Validates up to 10 VAT numbers in a single call across EU, UK, and Australia. Use for supplier onboarding batches, monthly vendor compliance checks, or CRM data cleaning. One call replaces 10 separate validate_vat calls.

arguments.name: vat_numbers
arguments.description: Array of VAT numbers with country prefixes (max 10)

name: analyse_vat_risk
description: Call AFTER validate_vat when the number is valid but fraud risk assessment is needed before payment. AI-powered analysis returns CLEAR/REVIEW/BLOCK with specific reasons: name mismatches, newly registered entities, shell company indicators, dormant status.

arguments.name: vat_number
arguments.description: The VAT number that was validated

arguments.name: validation_result
arguments.description: Full result object returned by validate_vat or validate_uk_vat

arguments.name: invoice_amount
arguments.description: Optional invoice amount in local currency

arguments.name: invoice_company_name
arguments.description: Optional company name as it appears on the invoice

name: compare_invoice_details
description: Call BEFORE approving any invoice payment. AI-powered comparison of invoice details against official VAT registry records. Detects name mismatches, wrong addresses, and fraudulent VAT numbers. Returns MATCH/PARTIAL_MATCH/MISMATCH/UNVERIFIABLE with field-level discrepancies.

arguments.name: invoice_company_name
arguments.description: Company name as it appears on the invoice

arguments.name: invoice_vat_number
arguments.description: VAT number as it appears on the invoice

arguments.name: validation_result
arguments.description: Full result object returned by validate_vat or validate_uk_vat

arguments.name: invoice_address
arguments.description: Optional address as it appears on the invoice
